Listing Compliance

Bombay Stock Exchange Ltd.

Dalal Street 
 
Bandra (E)

Security Code : 532514 
 
Trading Symbol : IGL 
 
Sub: Link of Transcript of Earnings Conference Call  
 
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
This is in continuation to our letter dated July 27, 2023. In this regard, please find 
below link of Transcript of Earnings Conference Call held on Wednesday, July 26, 
2023. 
 
https://iglonline.net/uploads/announcement/Indraprastha_Gas_Limited_(IGL_IN)_Q1
FY_2023-24_Earnings_Group_Conference_Call.pdf 
 
This is in compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015. 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours sincerely, 
for Indraprastha Gas Ltd. 
 
 
 
 
(S. K. Jain) 
Company Secretary & Compliance Officer 
 
 
 
SUNIL 
KUMA
R JAIN

signed by
